owner_directive: Add code-health gates to CI + gate pre-PR checks: ruff complexity ceiling (C901 max-complexity 30) and TODO/deferral discipline (ruff TD/FIX + deferral_scan.py whole-repo baseline ratchet + diff-scoped new-deferral block + new-TODO count), plus a hypothesis property test. Single PR. Calibrate baselines so CI does not break on merge.
